title: Detection
description: One detected inanimate urban object on an anonymized image. Person, face and license-plate classes are forbidden by contract — detection runs only after the anonymization gate.

object_class.description: Inanimate urban object class only, e.g. traffic_sign, billboard, pole, trash_bin, bench, traffic_light, pothole, street_lamp.

bbox.description: Normalized [0,1] coordinates relative to image width/height.

evidence_uri.description: Anonymized evidence crop only. Raw crops are forbidden.

model_id.description: Hugging Face model reference that produced this detection.
